name: Cowell e Holdings Inc.
summary: Cowell e Holdings Inc., an investment holding company, engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of camera modules for smartphones, multimedia tablets, and other mobile devices with camera functions in the People's Republic of China, the Republic of Korea, and internationally. It also designs, develops, manufactures, and sells optical components used in various consumer electronics products. It offers camera modules for mobile device manufacturers; and optical components to subsidiaries or affiliates of electronics companies. Cowell e Holdings Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Dongguan, the People's Republic of China.
